items.title: Artists Reclaim Lady Liberty
items.summary: Aruna D’Souza on the iconic monument as a tool of political expression and Ed Simon on the allure and anxiety of the Hudson River School.

items.title: What Does the Statue of Liberty Stand For?
items.summary: As artists like Amy Sherald, Marta Minujín, and Faith Ringgold remind us, the monument is far from a neutral symbol of so-called American values.

items.title: The Hudson River School’s American Apocalypse
items.summary: One of the United States’s first major art movements registered anxieties about industrialization, empire, and environmental ruin.

items.title: NYC's Swiss Institute Heads to the Bowery
items.summary: Raymond Pettibon and Abdelkader Benchamma team up on a massive mural, Seattle Art Museum's new chief curator, and more.
